/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unsplit.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unsplit.dir/unsplit_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unsplit.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unsplit.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unsplit.dir/unsplit_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o unsplit  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Xml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
